title: convolvulus ocularis
intro: Convolvulus ocularis, also known as the eye-bright or small bindweed, is a perennial plant in the morning glory family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Convolvulus ocularis include its ability to soothe eye irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for various eye and skin conditions. Convolvulus ocularis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as conjunctivitis, blepharitis, and skin ulcers.
